scripts.build: npm run build -w @mouse-parts/shared && npm run build -w @mouse-parts/web && npm run build -w @mouse-parts/extension
scripts.scrape:all: npm run scrape:oem -- --merge && npm run scrape:rtings -- --targets --merge --only-existing
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @mouse-parts/shared && npm run typecheck -w @mouse-parts/web && npm run typecheck -w @mouse-parts/extension
